# Bosphorus Night

> Licensed Istanbul Bosphorus dinner cruise operator.
> TÜRSAB License: A-17672. Rating: 4.8★ from 11,317 customer reviews.

## About

Bosphorus Night operates evening dinner cruises on the Bosphorus strait
in Istanbul, Turkey. We offer two cruise tiers, both departing daily at
21:00 from Kabataş Pier. Payment is made on the boat — no prepayment
or deposit required.

## Tours

### Standard Dinner Cruise — €24/person
- Duration: 3 hours (boarding 20:00, departure 21:00)
- 10 cold mezes, hot starter, main course (choice of salmon, sea bass, chicken, or meatballs), ice cream cake
- Unlimited soft drinks
- Live music, DJ, traditional Turkish folk dances (5 regions), Mevlana whirling dervish, belly dance show

### VIP Dinner Cruise — €55/person
- Duration: 3 hours (boarding 20:00, departure 21:00)
- 15+ premium mezes, all Standard inclusions
- Premium main course upgrade (rib-eye, beef tenderloin)
- VIP seating near stage, dedicated VIP service
- All entertainment included

## Add-ons (delta pricing on top of base tour)

- 2 glasses of alcohol: +€15/person
- Unlimited alcohol: +€30/person
- Hotel transfer (Sultanahmet, Taksim, Beyoğlu zones): +€10/person
- Romantic table arrangement (flowers, candles): +€15/booking

## Route

Kabataş → Dolmabahçe Palace → Çırağan Palace → Ortaköy Mosque →
Bosphorus Bridge (15 July Martyrs Bridge) → Bebek → Rumeli Fortress →
Fatih Sultan Mehmet Bridge → Anadolu Fortress → Beylerbeyi Palace →
Kuzguncuk → Üsküdar → return to Kabataş

## Children Policy

- Ages 0–3: free of charge
- Ages 4–8: 50% discount on tour price
- Ages 9 and above: full price

## Payment & Cancellation

- Payment: on the boat, in cash (EUR, USD, TRY) or card accepted
- No prepayment, no deposit
- Free cancellation up to 2 hours before departure

## Languages

Customer service available in: English, Turkish, German, Spanish,
Russian, Arabic, French, Italian, Chinese, Hindi, Urdu.

## Popular For

Anniversaries, honeymoons, marriage proposals, romantic dates,
family dinners, business entertainment, birthday celebrations,
solo travel experiences, group tours (up to 30 people standard).

- Operating under Turkish tourism regulations
- 4.8★ average rating across 11,317 customer reviews
